fields.description: Warehouses used by Cutting Job, Repack #1, Processing Job, Repack #2, and all glass stock movements.
fields.label: Inventory Warehouses

fields.description: Default item groups for auto-created glass items. Raw Sheet items are purchase-only; Final items are sales-only.
fields.label: Item Defaults

fields.description: One glass type code per line (for example CLEAR, BRONZE, TINTED). These are the only type codes allowed in GLS-* Item codes and Glass Product Specifications.
fields.label: Glass Types

fields.description: Rules that control how leftover glass is classified after cutting and what minimum area is charged to customers.
fields.label: Cutting and Remnant Rules

fields.description: Leftover glass with area below this threshold is classified as Scrap instead of Remnant.
fields.label: Minimum Remnant Area (m²)

fields.description: Leftover glass with any side shorter than this is classified as Scrap instead of Remnant.
fields.label: Minimum Remnant Side (mm)

fields.description: Glass pieces smaller than this area are still charged at this minimum.
fields.label: Minimum Chargeable Area (m²)

fields.description: Cutting blade thickness. Reserved for optimizer / cutting layout calculations.
fields.label: Kerf / Cutting Loss (mm)

fields.description: Default price lists used when no company or spec price list is configured. Raw buying cost priority: Company price list → Settings buying price list → Any buying Item Price. Raw selling price priority: Spec price list → Settings selling price list → Any selling Item Price.
fields.label: Price Lists

fields.description: Fallback buying price list for raw sheet cost lookup when the company has no buying price list configured.
fields.label: Default Raw Buying Price List

fields.description: Fallback selling price list used when a Glass Product Specification has no price list set.
fields.label: Default Finished Selling Price List

fields.description: Master default rates for all glass operations. Glass Product Specification copies these rates into its own table on first load. Users can override rates per spec without changing these settings.
fields.label: Operation Default Rates

fields.description: Enable only when COP import/export actions are fully configured.
fields.label: COP / Optimizer

fields.description: Legacy fields kept for backward compatibility with Phase 0 Quotation Glass Piece pricing. Do not use for new configurations. These fields will be removed in a future version.
fields.label: Advanced / Legacy

fields.description: Deprecated. Use the specific item group fields in Item Defaults instead.
fields.label: Default Item Group

fields.description: Deprecated. Use Operation Rates table instead. Polish is now priced Per Edge Meter, not Per m².
fields.label: Polish Rate (per m²)

fields.description: Deprecated. Use Operation Rates table instead. Bevel is now priced Per Edge Meter, not Per m².
fields.label: Bevel Rate (per m²)

fields.description: Deprecated. Use Operation Rates table instead. Holes are now priced Per Unit, not Per m².
fields.label: Holes / Drilling Rate (per m²)

fields.description: Deprecated. Use Operation Rates table instead. Slots are now priced Per Unit, not Per m².
fields.label: Slots Rate (per m²)

fields.description: Deprecated. Use Operation Rates table instead.
fields.label: Tempered Rate (per m²)

fields.label: Sandblast Rate (per m²)

fields.description: Deprecated. Use Operation Rates table instead.
fields.label: Laminated Rate (per m²)

fields.label: Polish Cost (per m²)

fields.label: Bevel Cost (per m²)
